description: Generic page summary — a starting-point schema for `crawler extract`. Copy this file and adjust `properties`/`required` for a specific extraction task; the extractor itself is schema-agnostic.

summary.description: One to two sentence summary of the page's main content.

primary_topic.description: The single main subject/topic of the page.

key_entities.description: Names of key people, products, organizations, or technologies mentioned.

content_type.description: The kind of page this is.
